Three coordinated additions giving the bot explicit time-of-day awareness end to end.

### Install-time setup
``setup.sh``'s new ``configure_time`` helper sets the system timezone (defaults to ``Europe/Berlin``, override with ``OCG_TIMEZONE=…``) and enables ``timedatectl set-ntp true``.
